---
title: "The Rev. Edward Coleridge"
---

## The Rev. Edward Coleridge

**Dates:** (1800-1883)

### Description

master at Eton, from 1867 Vicar of Mapledurham

### Biography

His first wife Mary Keate (d. 1859) was the daughter of Dr Keate, headmaster of Eton;  he married secondly (1862), Mary Caroline Bevan (1822/3-1907).  He was tutor to his nephew J. C. Patteson;  recipient of sums from CMY from 1853, perhaps on Patteson\'s behalf; and a keen supporter of missionary work.

### Letters

- Letter from Oct 8th [1873]
- Letter from  Novr 9th 1872
- Letter from April 25th 1872
- Letter from Novr 24th 1858
- Letter from March 28th [1857]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
